arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Newcastle take on Liverpool in the Premier League on Wednesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Man City in race for Frimpong
arts.sum: Jeremie Frimpong is reportedly being tracked by Liverpool and Man City. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Liverpool face 'more difficult' test up next after Real Madrid and Man City wins
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot is wary of the threat posed by Newcastle despite the Magpies winning just two of their last nine Premier League games ahead of their clash on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Newcastle and Everton could be trickier games than City and Madrid, warns Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool face two trips in wake of high-profile victories Slot jokes about charges levelled at Pep Guardiola’s club Arne Slot believes Liverpool’s imperious form has made them a bigger target for Premier League rivals and that trips to Newcastle and Everton could be more problematic than the statement wins against Real Madrid and Manchester City. The Liverpool’s head coach says it was not difficult for his team to show their prowess in beating the champions of Europe last week, and of England at Anfield on Sunday. The challenge now is to repeat those performances at St James’ Park on Wednesday and in Slot’s first Merseyside derby at Goodison Park on Saturday. He says Liverpool’s mentality on the road will be just as important as their ability. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Guardiola denies gesture in defeat at Liverpool shows he is losing his cool
arts.sum: Manager raised six fingers in reference to City’s title wins ‘It was to make our fans feel we’ve done extraordinary’ Pep Guardiola has denied that raising six fingers during Manchester City’s 2-0 at Liverpool on Sunday shows he is losing his cool in the manner José Mourinho did when showing three digits during his time in charge of Manchester United. Guardiola also aimed an apparent dig at Mourinho by pointing out that he has won six Premier League titles compared to the Portuguese’s three. Guardiola made the six-fingered gesture at Anfield after Liverpool fans chanted “you’re getting sacked in the morning” at the City manager, repeating it in the direction of the travelling supporters after the final whistle. Mourinho made his three‑fingered gesture following United’s 3-0 home defeat against Tottenham in August 2018 during a media conference in which he infamously demanded “respect, respect, respect”. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister shares true feelings on Liverpool's three contract rebels
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah dropped another hint he could leave Liverpool after their 2-0 win over Manchester City, but team-mate Alexis Mac Allister hopes he can stay along with Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold

arts.ttl: Liverpool DELETE Rio Ngumoha footage after Chelsea transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool have deleted footage of summer signing Rio Ngumoha in first-team training due to his immense performances against the club’s biggest stars. The 16-year-old moved to Anfield in a controversial transfer from Chelsea, with the Blues angered by his decision to leave west London for a Premier League rival.

arts.ttl: Report: Arne Slot could sign £1.5m star who won MOTM vs Man City to replace Mo Salah next season
arts.sum: Arne Slot is having a dream start to life at Liverpool. There was some pressure on the Dutchman when he was appointed as the new...

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah future: PSG president responds to rumours linking Liverpool star with Ligue 1 champions
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain president Nasser Al-Khelaifi dismisses rumours that the French club are looking to sign Liverpool star Mohamed Salah.

arts.ttl: Team News: Newcastle United vs. Liverpool injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Newcastle United and Liverpool.
